acceptanceReviewed.criterion: A node-scoped madobe remote output is created on Linux hardware
A disposable workspace or session is bound or moved to that output with live Hyprland evidence
Redacted Hyprland monitor and workspace JSON is recorded before, during, and after validation
Cleanup removes only the madobe-owned output and restores developer-session state
Findings are filed for any flaky or unproven binding behavior
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: No flaky or unproven behavior remains after the adapter command-form fix.

resolvedFindings.title: Hyprland 0.55 rejects legacy moveworkspacetomonitor dispatch syntax
resolvedFindings.observed: The legacy hyprctl dispatch form failed with a Lua parser error on Hyprland 0.55.2.
resolvedFindings.expected: The adapter must use a Hyprland 0.55-compatible command form and live binding must move the disposable workspace onto the madobe output.
resolvedFindings.summary: Updated bind_session to use hl.dsp.workspace.move through hyprctl eval and validated it through madobectl display bind.
